steps.title: Spot the reach advantage
steps.content: The key signal is “more broadly than she could without the organization's reach.” The blank must name an action the artist can perform with her work that the organization's wider platform enables.

steps.title: Match the action to the choices
steps.content: PROMOTE is correct — it means to publicize or showcase work, which is what an expanded platform enables. The other three don't relate to sharing with broader audiences. That matches choice B — B is correct.
